mission.title: nats: Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes
mission.description: Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current nats deployment
steps.description:
Verify your nats version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
helm list -n nats 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working nats installation.

steps.title: Review nats configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant nats configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
kubectl get configmap -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nats
```
Hello! Currently the mechanism of load balancing of client connections to nats cluster is based on random node selection.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes
steps.description:
- [X] Link to issue, e.g. `Resolves #NNN`
 - [X] Branch rebased on top of current main (`git pull --rebase origin main`)

 - [X] You have certified that the contribution is your original work and that you license the work to the project under the [Apache 2 license](https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/blob/main/LICENSE)

### Changes proposed in this pull request:

Adds tw new $SYS server API endpoints:

- `$SYS.REQ.SERVER.%s.KICK` (where %s is the server_id) which 'kicks' (effectiveley

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade nats to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade nats:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade nats nats/nats --namespace nats
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n nats
helm list -n nats
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats
kubectl get events -n nats --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Client connections load balancing among nats cluster nodes" is functioning correctly.
